series_metadata.series_description: Used to transfer appropriations at the Spending Authority Code (SAC) level on the Central Accounting System between quarters of the fiscal year if they are within the same appropriation line item of an appropriation bill

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
